arts.ttl: Celtic team news and Predicted XI vs St Johnstone: Brendan Rodgers' big calls
arts.sum: Celtic take on St Johnstone in the Scottish Cup semi-final on Sunday as the Bhoys continue to hunt for a treble.

arts.ttl: Celtic's Scottish Cup dominance in numbers
arts.sum: Celtic head to Hampden to face St Johnstone in Sunday's Scottish Cup semi-final looking to improve on some impressive records in the competition.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton warns Robbie Savage about Celtic claim after Aston Villa's Champions League exit
arts.sum: Whilst the vast majority of Celtic supporters will see getting out of the group as a success, Chris Sutton has to put Robbie Savage straight once again after he ‘misquoted’ the Hoops legend’s verdict on the defeat in Munich. Sutton puts Savage straight on Celtic’s Champions League performance vs Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: I'm Daizen Maeda's old skipper - I knew he was destined for Celtic greatness
arts.sum: Daizen Maeda's old skipper, Zainadine Junior, knew he was destined to hit the heights he has recently reached at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Anthony Ralston names 2 Celtic stars who give him 'hope and inspiration' as he opens up on Alistair Johnston bond
arts.sum: The Scotland defender - who has played mainly second fiddle to the right-back - is still learning and loving life at Parkhead

arts.ttl: The Rangers 'memory' Anthony Ralston wants to recreate for Celtic in the Scottish Cup vs St Johnstone
arts.sum: The last Celtic win vs St Johnstone in a Scottish Cup semi-final set up iconic Hoops season The last time Jota appeared in a Scottish Cup semi-final for Celtic was in the 1-0 win against Rangers at Hampden back in 2023.

arts.ttl: I spent a decade in Celtic's academy - I've just returned from a two-year long injury
arts.sum: Former Celtic academy youngster Grant Savoury made his long-awaited return from injury on Saturday as Queen's Park drew 0-0 with Hamilton Academical.

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda and a forgotten transfer as Celtic top boy sold to best teams on planet like a superstar signing
arts.sum: As a young player at Japanese minnows Matsumoto Yamaga, the Hoops attacker was sent on loan to Maritimo in 2019

arts.sum: Tommy Burns' words of wisdom still ring true for Hugh who wonders if Rodgers' Greg Taylor message was meant for Idah's ears
